data.title: PennyMac Financial to present at 2025 Barclays Conference with CEO David Spector and CFO Daniel Perotti at 2:45pm EST.
data.description: PennyMac Financial Services, Inc. (NYSE: PFSI) from Westlake Village, California, disclosed plans to co-present with PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (NYSE: PMT) at the 2025 Barclays Global Financial Services Conference. The event is set for Monday, September 8, 2025, at 2:45 p.m. Eastern Time. The discussion will feature Chairman and CEO David Spector and CFO Daniel Perotti. The presentation will be in the format of a fireside chat. For those interested, a live audio webcast link will be provided.

data.title: American Nurses Association concerned by high number of sudden leadership changes at CDC, impacting public health.
data.description: A concerning number of leadership transitions poses potential risks to public health. The vital link between public health, the economy, and national security should not be underestimated. The American Nurses Association (ANA) from Silver Spring, Md., revealed on August 29, 2025, the urgency of addressing this issue. It highlighted the significant impact on the nation's well-being and emphasized the importance of stable leadership to ensure effective management in this critical sector.

data.title: Verb Technology (Nasdaq: VERB) to release Chairman's message on Sep 5 after renaming to TON Strategy Company.
data.description: In Las Vegas, Verb Technology Company, Inc. (Nasdaq: VERB) revealed plans to release its inaugural "Chairman’s Message" on September 5, 2025. Manuel Stotz, the Executive Chairman of the Board of Directors, will issue the message to offer stockholders and the wider market a glimpse into the Company's strategy, advancements, and future outlook. The Company, formerly known as Verb Techn, has informed the market about its upcoming name change.

data.title: Broadcom expected to benefit from AI data centers chip sales in upcoming quarterly report.
data.description: Broadcom is expected to experience a surge in revenue from the sale of chips for AI data centers in its upcoming fiscal third-quarter announcement. This potential growth is likely to positively impact the company's financial performance.

data.title: Shareholders of Mount Logan Capital Inc. approve business combination with 180 Degree Capital Corp after 180 Degree Capital shareholders' meeting on Aug 22, 2025.
data.description: 180 Degree Capital held a meeting on August 22, 2025, where shareholders voted in favor of resolutions enabling the company to proceed with the Business Combination.
Samsung, SK Hynix Lose US Waiver on Chip Gear for China Use

data.title: Burlington Stores Inc (BURL) has strong Q2 results, with 5% comp growth and stock stumble in trading despite positive analyst ratings.
data.description: Burlington Stores Inc (NYSE: BURL) experienced a decline in early trading despite the release of positive second-quarter results. Analyst Dana Telsey from Telsey Advisory Group maintained an Outperform rating and increased the price target from $300 to $350. Similarly, analyst Brooke Roach from Goldman Sachs reiterated a Buy rating and raised the price target from $316 to $339. Analysts were impressed with Burlington Stores' strong quarterly performance, noting revenue growth and gross margin expansion exceeded expectations. The company achieved a 5% comp, building upon a 5% gain in the second quarter of 2024 and following a 0% comp in the previous quarter. Management was described as cautious by analysts. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: July existing-home sales increased by 2.0% according to NAR, providing crucial data for real estate professionals.
data.description: A recent report released by the National Association of REALTORS ® revealed a 2.0% rise in existing-home sales in July in Washington, D.C. The report aims to offer insights to the real estate industry, supplying crucial data on home sales volume, pricing trends, and available inventory to assist agents, buyers, and sellers in making informed decisions.

data.title: JasmyCoin (JASMY) price falls 6% to $0.01, nearing key support levels with RSI at 42.43 indicating potential oversold conditions.
data.description: The price of JASMY has decreased by 6% to reach $0.01, getting close to important support levels. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 42.43, indicating possible oversold conditions for traders looking at the short term.

data.title: SRx Health Solutions has begun restructuring under CCAA for its Canadian subsidiary; U.S. operations, including Halo, remain unaffected.
data.description: The ongoing CCAA Proceedings will not have any impact on U.S. operations, which includes the subsidiary Halo. There are no plans for a bankruptcy filing in the U.S. The company assures that its operations in the U.S., along with Halo subsidiary, will continue as usual despite the CCAA Proceedings.

data.title: US stocks lower; Fed's preferred inflation index surges, hitting 2.6% in July from a year earlier, above 2% target.
data.description: US stocks traded lower on Friday, with Nasdaq Composite falling over 0.4%. The Dow traded down 0.22% to 45,537.65, Nasdaq fell 0.44% to 21,610.49, and S&P 500 dropped 0.24% to 6,486.33. Energy sector rose by 0.3% while technology stocks fell by 0.8%. Inflation rate soared to 2.6% from a year earlier, meeting expectations, as per the US Bureau of Economic Analysis. This surge raises doubts on the timing of Jerome Powell's expected interest rate cuts. More details on Benzinga.com.
New York Federal Reserve Accepts Full $77.898 Billion of Submitted Funds to Reverse Repo Facility on August 29

data.title: John Malone, a key figure in modern media for 50 years, reflects on his impact in "Born to Be Wired."
data.description: Over the past 50 years, John Malone has played a significant role in shaping the modern media industry. In his recent memoir titled "Born to Be Wired," he reflects on his contributions and the impact he has had. This memoir delves into Malone's influence in transforming the media landscape and highlights the key milestones of his impressive career. Throughout his journey, Malone has been instrumental in revolutionizing the industry and his memoir provides a unique insight into the evolution of media.

data.title: Elon Musk's AI "mothership" may revolutionize technology, as per James Altucher's presentation.
data.description: A recent presentation by James Altucher introduced Elon Musk's ambitious AI project referred to as the "mothership." This project is envisioned to revolutionize the technology landscape with its massive scale and potential impact on the future.

data.title: Pacsun brings fall fashion to college campuses with multi-city campus tour starting August 30th.
data.description: Pacsun, a leading fashion brand among Gen Z, is dominating the back-to-school period by offering trendy styles directly to college campuses across the country. Starting on August 30, the brand is initiating its college series and will be part of the gameday buzz. This initiative is positioning Pacsun to connect with a large audience of college students and capitalize on the lucrative back-to-school market.

data.title: NBA® 2K26 Superstar and Leave No Doubt Editions now out on Early Access for PS5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam. Other editions available on Sept 5, 2025.
data.description: 2K has revealed the launch of NBA® 2K26 Superstar Edition and Leave No Doubt* Edition. These editions are now available for Early Access on PlayStation®5 (PS5®), Xbox Series X|S, and PC via Steam. Other editions like the Standard Edition and WNBA Edition (exclusive to GameStop in the U.S.) will be released globally on September 5, 2025, for PS5, PlayStation®4 (PS4®), Xbox Series X|S, and Xbox.

data.title: VeChain (VET) falls by 6%, trading at $0.02 after dropping 5.97%, with RSI of 48 indicating neutral trends.
data.description: The price of VET is currently at $0.02, showing a decline of 5.97%. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 48, indicating a period of sideways consolidation expected for traders of VeChain.

data.title: Safe Bulkers, Inc. will sell a 2006-built Kamsarmax class vessel, MV Pedhoulas Merchant, for $11.5 million in September 2025.
data.description: In Monaco on August 12, 2025, Safe Bulkers, Inc. revealed a significant business development. The international maritime firm disclosed a deal involving the sale of MV Pedhoulas Merchant, which is a dry-bulk vessel falling under the Kamsarmax class and originally constructed in Japan in 2006. The agreed-upon gross sale price for this transaction stands at $11.5 million, with the anticipated delivery scheduled for September 2025. This move marks an important strategic decision for the Company, underscoring its ongoing operations in the marine drybulk transportation sector.

data.title: Iren stock surges 26% on beating earnings, becoming "preferred partner" of Nvidia.
data.description: Iren's stock rose significantly following its report of better-than-expected earnings and announcement of becoming a "preferred partner" of Nvidia. The Bitcoin mining and AI data center company saw a surge of 26% in its stock value. This partnership with Nvidia signifies a positive development for Iren, highlighting its growth potential in the technology sector.

data.title: Tokenized alt funds surge by 47% to $1.7B in 30 days. Ethereum dominates at $1B, over half the market value.
data.description: The institutional alternative funds market, which includes tokenized assets, is dominated by Ethereum with a total value exceeding $1 billion. This represents over 50% of the total market value for such funds.
